steps.name: log Positive test scenario
Before@positive
log Initialized API client
Before@api
log API base URL set to: https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com
Given the API base URL is "https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com"
log Content-Type header set to: application/json
And the request content type is "application/json"
log Request body stored: {"id":1,"title":"Updated Title via Cypress","body":"Updated body via automated API test.","userId":1}
Given I set the request body:
log PUT https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/1
log Body: {"id":1,"title":"Updated Title via Cypress","body":"Updated body via automated API test.","userId":1}

request ("{ method: 'PUT', url: 'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/pos'... 4 more characters, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', Accept: 'application/json' }, body: { id: 1, title: 'Updated Title via Cypress', body: 'Updated body via automated API test.', userId: 1 }, failOnStatusCode: false }")
log API: PUT https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/1
log Status: 200 (116ms)
log Request Body: {"id":1,"title":"Updated Title via Cypress","body":"Updated body via automated API test.","userId":1}
log Response Body: {"id":1,"title":"Updated Title via Cypress","body":"Updated body via automated API test.","userId":1}
wrap Object{9}
When I send a PUT request to "/posts/1"
Then the response status code should be 200
assertexpected { Object (body, headers, ...) } not to be null
